text.title: HTTP Caching Headers (Cache-Control, ETag, Vary, CDN) Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules every HTTP Caching Headers (Cache-Control, ETag, Vary, CDN) application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Every response MUST set `Cache-Control` explicitly — never rely on framework defaults.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: RFC 9111 + CDN best-practice docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Use `s-maxage` for CDN, `max-age` for browser; treat them as independent dials.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Fastly / Cloudflare docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Use strong `ETag` for byte-identical caches; weak `ETag` (`W/`) when only the semantic body matches.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: RFC 9110. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Set `Vary: Authorization, Accept-Language` whenever response varies by either; missing Vary causes cache poisoning.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: OWASP cache-poisoning advisory. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: PII / auth-bearing responses MUST set `Cache-Control: private, no-store` — never `public`.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: PCI-DSS + GDPR storage guidance. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Pair `s-maxage` with `stale-while-revalidate` for high-read endpoints to absorb origin blips.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: RFC 5861. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Tag responses with `Surrogate-Key` (Fastly) / `Cache-Tag` (Cloudflare) per entity; purge by tag on write.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Fastly + Cloudflare docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold and no duplicate exists.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.

rule.statement: Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when a duplicate is found.
